name: polymath-vuln-scan
description: Snyk connector: MCP server for vulnerability test/monitor + Stop hook that warns if the current branch has open critical vulns.

snykToken.title: Snyk API token
snykToken.description: Snyk auth token (Account settings → General → Auth Token).

snykOrg.title: Snyk org slug
snykOrg.description: Default Snyk org slug or ID; passed as --org to commands.
